cards.back: A method used to track the edges of an image by following the chain code
A numerical representation of the direction of adjacent pixels along the boundary of an object

cards.front: What is Erosion in the context of Boundary Preprocessing?
cards.back: The process of removing small details from an image while keeping the overall boundary intact

cards.front: What is Dilation in the context of Boundary Preprocessing?
cards.back: The process of increasing the size of an image's boundary while keeping the details intact

cards.front: What is the main goal of Boundary Preprocessing?
cards.back: To enhance the visibility and definition of an image's boundary
